title: pentacalia disciformis
intro: Pentacalia disciformis, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is a wildflower native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pentacalia disciformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
